headline: Allstate (ALL) Appoints Chris Lown As CFO Ahead Of August 2026 Start
summary: Allstate (NYSE:ALL) has appointed Christian (Chris) Lown as Chief Financial Officer. Lown is scheduled to assume the CFO role on August 3, 2026. He brings experience from major financial institutions and prior CFO positions. The appointment represents a significant governance development for Allstate. Allstate (NYSE:ALL) is a major player in personal lines insurance, with investors closely watching how management responds to a challenging operating backdrop for the sector. Pricing, claims...
